items.brand: Men's Large · fits 5'8"–6'1" · Shearling trim · Black

items.description: 3-gallon rimless tank with a halfmoon female betta. Comes with everything: internal filter, LED lights, the fish, a fish net, fish flakes, and floating plants. 😂

items.name: Bouclé Accent Chair
items.description: Cozy rounded bouclé lounge chair with solid wood legs. Barely used — no stains, no pilling. Super comfortable reading/accent chair. Throw blanket not included.

items.name: Decor Pot & Vase
items.description: Glossy green ceramic vase paired with a white scalloped dish. Lovely shelf or console decor — sold together as a set.

items.name: Decor Books (Set of 6)
items.description: Set of 6 decor/coffee-table books — Made for Living (Amber Lewis), The Curated Home, Style Comfort Home, The Louvre, Mindful Places to Stay, and The Complete Traveler's Guide to Italy. Perfect for styling shelves. Retails ~$175 for the set.

items.name: Frame Floor Mirror
items.description: Full-length wavy bubble wood floor mirror. Leans against the wall — makes a gorgeous statement piece and great for outfit pics. Barely used.
